nidhipa (ni˚ + pa) m. Schatzhüter: yameva tu śuciṃ vidyā niyataṃ brahmacāriṇam . tasmai māṃ brūhi viprāya nidhipāyāpramādine ..  M. 2,115 . nidhipaṃ ca dhaneśvaram  MBH. 12,7552 . yajñasya, vedasya  ĀŚV. GṚHY. 1,22 .
— Vgl. nidhipā.
